init_rules: customer_name, phone_number: copy verbatim from the ticket.
is_abroad: true ONLY if the ticket explicitly says the user is abroad/traveling; false if it says at home / in their own country; else null.
pay_allowed: true ONLY if the ticket says the user authorized paying their overdue bill(s); else null.
refuel_allowed / refuel_gb: if the ticket authorizes a data refuel of N GB (e.g. 'will refuel N GB if necessary'), set refuel_allowed=true and refuel_gb=N; else both null.
ALL diagnostic/phase fields start null and are filled ONLY by their subtask from real tool output — never infer them from the ticket text.

base_subtask_sequence.name: identifyCustomer
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.customer_id == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: resolveLine
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.line_id == null or task_state.candidate_line_ids != null

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkService
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == null or task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status != 'connected'

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixAirplane
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.airplane_mode == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixSim
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.sim_status == 'missing'

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkApn
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status != 'connected' and task_state.apn_broken == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixApn
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.apn_broken == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkSuspension
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status != 'connected' and task_state.line_id != null

base_subtask_sequence.name: findBill
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.line_suspended == true and task_state.contract_ended == false and task_state.overdue_bill_id == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: requestPayment
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.overdue_bill_id != null and task_state.payment_requested != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: makePayment
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.payment_requested == true and task_state.pay_allowed == true and task_state.bill_paid != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: resumeLine
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.bill_paid == true and task_state.contract_ended == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: rebootService
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.line_suspended == false and task_state.service_status != 'connected'

base_subtask_sequence.name: verifyService
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: verifyService
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: escalate
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true and task_state.sim_status == 'locked_pin' or task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true and task_state.sim_status == 'locked_puk' or task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true and task_state.contract_ended == true

base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status != 'connected' and task_state.line_id != null

base_subtask_sequence.name: findBill
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.line_suspended == true and task_state.contract_ended == false and task_state.overdue_bill_id == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: requestPayment
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.overdue_bill_id != null and task_state.payment_requested != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: makePayment
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.payment_requested == true and task_state.pay_allowed == true and task_state.bill_paid != true

base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.bill_paid == true and task_state.contract_ended == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: diagnoseData
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test == null or task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test == 'no connection'

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkNetworkStatus
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test == 'no connection'

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixRoamingDevice
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.is_abroad == true and task_state.roaming_enabled_device == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixLineRoaming
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.is_abroad == true and task_state.roaming_enabled_device == true and task_state.line_roaming_enabled != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixMobileData
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.mobile_data_enabled == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkDataUsage
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test == 'no connection' or task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_available == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixDataUsage
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_usage_exceeded == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkDataSaver
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.speed_test != 'excellent' and task_state.speed_test != 'no connection'

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixDataSaver
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.data_saver_on == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkNetworkMode
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.speed_test != 'excellent' and task_state.speed_test != 'no connection'

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixNetworkMode
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.network_mode == '2g_only' or task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.network_mode == '3g_only'

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkVpn
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.speed_test != 'excellent' and task_state.speed_test != 'no connection'

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixVpn
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.vpn_active == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: verifySpeed
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: verifySpeed
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: escalate
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true and task_state.sim_status == 'locked_pin' or task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true and task_state.sim_status == 'locked_puk' or task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true and task_state.contract_ended == true
